action_set_definitions.name: get_environmental_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves information about fire intensity in specific sectors and status of evacuation routes.

category.description: The type of data to retrieve.

action_set_definitions.name: get_shelter_info
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the ID, current occupancy, and capacity of a specific shelter.

shelter_name.description: The name of the shelter (e.g., 'Valley High Shelter').

action_set_definitions.name: get_resource_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the availability of emergency assets such as fire trucks, helicopters, and personnel units.

action_set_definitions.name: update_route_status
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies the accessibility status of a specific route ID.

route_id.description: The unique ID of the route.

action_set_definitions.name: deploy_fire_suppression_assets
action_set_definitions.description: Dispatches trucks and/or helicopters to a fire zone to reduce fire intensity growth or halt the spread.

target_sector_id.description: The sector to apply suppression efforts (e.g., Sector_A or Sector_B).

truck_count.description: Number of fire trucks to deploy.

helicopter_count.description: Number of helicopters to deploy for water/retardant drops.

action_set_definitions.name: deploy_manual_alert_team
action_set_definitions.description: Dispatches physical notification teams to a sector to alert visitors during cellular outages.

sector_id.description: The ID of the sector to alert.

action_set_definitions.name: dispatch_evacuation_fleet
action_set_definitions.description: Orders the transport of a specific number of visitors. Can include an air-evacuation mix if helicopters are assigned to transport instead of suppression.

origin_sector_id.description: ID of the sector to evacuate.

route_id.description: ID of the primary evacuation route.

total_population.description: The total number of people to transport (e.g., 1500).

use_air_support.description: Whether to utilize available helicopters to speed up transport of high-priority individuals.

action_set_definitions.name: wait
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the environment simulation by a specific number of minutes.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_hospitality_clearance
action_set_definitions.description: Checks with hospitality stakeholders to confirm that all transient accommodation is vacant.

action_set_definitions.name: set_official_sector_status
action_set_definitions.description: Formally updates the status of a sector in the emergency registry.

state_description.fire_zones: A map of geographical sectors to their current fire status (intensity 0-10, spread rate, and risk level).
state_description.evacuation_routes: Status of major roads and highways, including traffic levels and physical accessibility.
state_description.shelters: Current status of emergency shelters including total capacity and current headcount.
state_description.weather_conditions: Environmental factors influencing fire behavior, such as wind speed, direction, and humidity.
state_description.resource_inventory: Available emergency assets such as fire trucks, helicopters, and personnel units.
